style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: 推开窗 城市的灯火依旧很拥挤 / 我的梦 藏在草稿纸里默默呼吸

atmosphere.overall_mood: 王家卫式雨夜孤独——推窗俯瞰拥挤港风街头，草稿纸上画着茶山的梦
atmosphere.lighting: 窗外霓虹灯映射+雨水反射光

video_prompt: Wong Kar-wai style: pushing open window blinds revealing a rainy Hong Kong street below with dense neon signs, step-printed slow motion, then close-up of draft papers with tea mountain sketches blown by wind, heavy film grain, anamorphic, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 主歌开始，吉他或钢琴旋律缓缓展开

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角的手推开百叶窗——金属叶片一条条翻开，窗外雨夜霓虹渐渐透入
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 百叶窗叶片翻开如电影场景揭幕
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 百叶窗金属叶片翻动声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a hand pushing open metal venetian blinds revealing a rainy neon-lit Hong Kong street outside, red and green neon light spilling through the slats, raindrops on the window glass, Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 俯拍港风街头全景——逼仄的窄巷，密集霓虹灯招牌层叠，雨水拍打灯管，行人如蚁
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 俯瞰拥挤的雨夜香港街巷——灯火璀璨但拥挤窒息
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 雨声、远处人声嘈杂、霓虹灯嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: High angle overhead view of a narrow Hong Kong alley at night in the rain, dense vertical neon signs stacked in red green and yellow, rain splashing on neon tubes, tiny pedestrians with umbrellas below, claustrophobic urban canyon, Wong Kar-wai cinematography, anamorphic wide angle, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 王家卫式抽帧慢镜——雨水沿霓虹灯管滑落，特写霓虹灯反射在水洼中
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 王家卫标志性的雨水+霓虹美学
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 雨滴击打灯管的放大声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Step-printed slow motion close-up of raindrops sliding down a glowing neon sign tube, the neon light reflected in rain puddles on the ground below creating colorful abstract patterns, red green and yellow neon, Wong Kar-wai signature rain and neon aesthetic, heavy film grain, anamorphic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角站在窗前俯望街头，背影轮廓被窗外霓虹勾勒，肩膀下沉
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 背影被霓虹灯勾勒的孤独感
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Silhouette of a man in an oversized vintage suit standing at a window looking down at a rainy neon-lit Hong Kong street, colorful neon light outlining his figure from behind, slumped shoulders, lonely watching posture, Wong Kar-wai cinematic backlit shot, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 一阵风从窗口灌入——桌上的草稿纸被吹起翻飞
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 风吹动草稿——被困的梦想终于有了呼吸
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Draft papers being blown up by wind from a window in a dark Hong Kong apartment, the papers flying and swirling in the air, lit by alternating red and green neon light from outside, chaotic paper dance, Wong Kar-wai style atmospheric moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 特写——飞起的草稿纸上画着凌乱的茶山梯田草图和如意云纹，用铅笔画在方格纸上
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 草稿上的茶山——梦的痕迹，在现实中被冷落
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a draft paper caught in midair showing rough pencil sketches of terraced tea mountains and traditional Chinese cloud patterns drawn on graph paper, the paper lit by green CRT and colorful neon light, dreams trapped on paper, Wong Kar-wai detail shot, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 草稿纸缓缓落回桌面——落在那杯冷茶旁边，茶水倒映出纸上的茶山图案
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶水倒映出草稿上的茶山——现实与梦的初次叠影
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Top-down shot of a draft paper landing next to a half-full cup of cold tea on a cluttered desk, the tea surface reflecting the pencil tea mountain sketch from the paper, subtle mirror effect hinting at another world, dim Hong Kong apartment, Wong Kar-wai detail, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角伸手拿起那杯冷茶，低头凝视茶水表面——茶水中隐隐有一片茶叶在微微发光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶叶的微光——是幻觉还是预兆？
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young man in a dark suit holding up a cup of cold tea and staring into it, inside the tea a single tea leaf glows faintly with cyan-green light, subtle magical hint in a realistic Hong Kong apartment setting, neon light on face, Wong Kar-wai style, film grain, intimate close-up, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角放下茶杯，转身望向CRT屏幕——屏幕上的代码似乎在微微跳动，像有了生命

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 放下茶杯转身望向屏幕

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 屏幕代码似乎有了自主意识——伏笔
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A man turning from his tea cup to face a CRT monitor, the green code on screen appearing to pulse and move with a life of its own, the code characters subtly brighter than before, something awakening in the machine, Hong Kong apartment, Wong Kar-wai style, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio
